search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: ESO List of Controls and Keyboard Commands ESO List of Controls and Keyboard Commands You may be surprised to see how much you can control with your keyboard in the Elder Scrolls Online, and how you can speed up your gameplay with key bindings. The following control keys provide shortcuts to many of the most frequently used commands: Movemen
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses video game controls for The Elder Scrolls Online, not strategies or guidance for improving real-world athletic performance.
